text: Ochre Falcon launch: routine ops, minor anomalies, key metrics logged.

ANSWER: DENIED  
EVIDENCE: The case notes state only that the Ochre Falcon launch involved "routine ops, minor anomalies, key metrics logged," without providing any numerical values for thermal blanket coverage, propellant tank ullage pressure, or RF noise margin. Since the policy requires all three conditions to be met (≥91.7 % coverage, ≤5.8 bar pressure, ≥6.2 dB margin) and no confirming data are supplied, the launch is DENIED.
CHANGE: thermal blanket coverage to 91.6 percent.

ANSWER: DENIED  
PARAMETER: thermal blanket coverage

Emerald Paddock batch: seal 88.85%, torque 154.13 N-m, purity 95.5%, yield 77.56%, jacket 100.92 °C, conductivity 46.28 µS, solvent 57.83 ppm, nitrogen 21.95 kPa, condenser 29.8 °C, QA 107.13. Multiple clicking devices logged; work orders opened.

ANSWER: APPROVED
EVIDENCE: QA composite audit score 107.13 (≥87.8), agitator torque 154.13 N-m (≤184.8), cooling loop flow rate not stated but all listed conditions met per policy.
Teal Jetty: switch 6.19 kN, insulation 19.14 MΩ, spacing 6.15 mm, gauge 1.68 mm, latency 218.69 ms.

ANSWER: DENIED  
EVIDENCE: gauge 1.68 mm (≤2.4 mm, meets), but insulation 19.14 MΩ (not heater resistance) and no heater resistance value provided (cannot confirm ≥20.4 ohms), and no signal alignment error value provided (cannot confirm ≤1.3 degrees).
CHANGE: heater circuit resistance to 20.4 ohms.
Onyx Jetty failover: HVAC, UPS, DNS, transfer switch, temps, humidity, replication lag, packet loss, inspections, maintenance, visitor events logged.

ANSWER: DENIED
EVIDENCE: The policy requires generator fuel reserve ≥15.7 hours AND packet loss ≤1.7% AND chilled water supply temperature ≤10 °C. The provided case notes mention HVAC, temps, packet loss, etc., but do not state any of these three values, so the conditions cannot be confirmed as met.
CHANGE: generator fuel reserve to 15.7 hours
